creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am running a slightly older HEAD:

FreeBSD lent.shxd.cx 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r278031: Sun Feb  1 18:24:33 UTC 2015     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

NB: And in the process of upgrading base to catch up with HEAD

I just did a "pkg upgrade" and can indeed replicate the bug. Before the upgrade, I don't know what (working) version of gimp I had, but I'm now running gimp-2.8.16,2 and it has the same failure to open files and/or generate thumbnail images (firefox-43.0.3_1,1 has no issues just as the OP reports).

Will report back after I have sync'd my base to latest HEAD, regarding if that makes a difference or not.

(sad face; I <3 gimp)
